title: Force Mob Challenge inspired by BastiGHG
description: Kill a Random Number of this Mod and try to beat the Ender Dragon.
body:
# Force Mob Challenge Mod (1.21.11)

This Minecraft mod adds an exciting challenge to servers where the entire world is transformed into a specific target mob.

## Features

- **Dynamic Challenge**: Each time a challenge starts, a random mob and a random number (1-100) are selected.

- **Worldwide Transformation**: Every mob that spawns in the world is automatically transformed into the current target mob.

- **Boss Bar**: A bar at the top of the screen displays the current target mob and progress (e.g., `SALMON - 14/23`).

- **PBP (Piglin Protection)**: Piglins (all variants) and Hoglins are excluded from the transformation to maintain playability in the Nether.

- **Real-time Tracking**: Progress is instantly displayed in the Boss Bar and in the chat upon completion.

- **Server-Side**: The mod only needs to be installed on the server. Players do not need to install the mod themselves.

## Commands
| Command | Description |

| `/Mobchallenge start` | Starts the challenge and begins transforming the mobs. |

| `/Mobchallenge stop` | Ends the challenge and restores normal spawn behavior. |

| `/Mobchallenge reset` | Resets the current challenge and generates a new one. |

| `/Mobchallenge skip` | Skips the current challenge (similar to Reset, with a different message). |

## Installation

1. Make sure you are using a **Fabric server** running version **1.21.1**.

2. Copy the generated `.jar` file to the `mods` folder of your server.

3. Restart the server.

## Technical Details

- **Version**: Minecraft 1.21.11

- **Loader**: Fabric

- **Stability**: Includes built-in protection against "spawn flooding" (mob cap protection) and prevents infinite recursion loops when replacing entities.
